name: PayPal
description: Connects to PayPal REST API v2 to sync transactions, orders, and payments into the Shielva knowledge base using OAuth2 client credentials authentication.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.help: Your PayPal REST app Client ID. Found in the PayPal Developer Dashboard under My Apps & Credentials.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.help: Your PayPal REST app Client Secret. Found in the PayPal Developer Dashboard next to the Client ID.

install_fields.label: Sandbox Mode
install_fields.help: Set to 'true' to use the PayPal sandbox environment for testing. Leave empty or set to 'false' for live/production.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate client_id and client_secret by acquiring an OAuth2 client_credentials token from POST /v1/oauth2/token.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Re-acquire an OAuth2 token to verify credentials are still valid and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Transactions & Orders
methods.description: Full or incremental sync of PayPal transactions into the knowledge base using GET /v1/reporting/transactions.

methods.name: List Transactions
methods.description: Retrieve a paginated list of transactions within a date range.

methods.name: Get Order
methods.description: Retrieve a single PayPal order by order ID.

methods.name: List Payments
methods.description: Retrieve a paginated list of PayPal payment records.

methods.name: Get Balance
methods.description: Retrieve the current PayPal account balances.
